# CODING_STANDARDS.md

## Output Location Rule (Mandatory)

**All generated files, code, and build artifacts must be written directly into the assigned project root folder.**

Writing deliverables to any git worktree, `.claude/worktrees/`, temporary harness folder, or any location other than the real project root is **strictly forbidden**. This is considered a process violation and must be reported in the build report.
